author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Context: PRD requires imported hierarchical IDs to be preserved verbatim. Beads import is covered but todos import lacks an explicit release-hardening contract guard. Approach: clarify docs, add focused unit and integration assertions for hierarchical todo IDs, and rerun pm verification sweeps.
Guard todos import hierarchical ID preservation
Add explicit docs and regression coverage for preserving hierarchical imported IDs during todos markdown import.
todos import preserves hierarchical IDs such as pm-foo.1.2 verbatim; docs mention the behavior explicitly; targeted and full regression sweeps pass with 100% coverage preserved.
Gap confirmed: todos import behavior exists in code but lacks explicit docs and test guard for hierarchical imported IDs.
Close import-contract gap for hierarchical todo IDs
Prevents regressions in imported tracker identity fidelity
Reduces silent importer drift for users migrating nested and hierarchical work items
todos import contract is explicit and regression-tested
No open items remain and Milestone 5 built-in extensions still need incremental hardening
